sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66014" key="melikhrw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελι-κηρώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n66014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">due to</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μελικηρίς</foreign> I, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἕλκος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg004:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
